message:
feat(raptorq): add metamorphic property erasure-recovery test battery (bd-3syrq)

Add 15 property-based tests verifying codec invariants hold under varied
erasure patterns, symbol orderings, and parameter regimes:

- P1:  Source reconstruction sweep (7 K/seed configs)
- P2:  Symbol permutation resilience (5 shuffles)
- P3:  No silent corruption under random erasure
- P4:  Erasure pattern independence (6 patterns, same count)
- P5:  Burst erasure recovery (4 positions)
- P6:  Repair symbol determinism (20 ESIs)
- P7:  Cross-instance encoding determinism
- P8:  Pure repair decoding (all source erased)
- P9:  Insufficient symbols error semantics
- P10: Seed sensitivity (different seeds -> different output)
- P11: Interleaved source/repair ratios (25%/50%/75% loss)
- P12: Symbol size invariance (1-256 bytes)
- P13: Multi-seed erasure stress (50 seeds)
- P14: Repair equation consistency (algebra identity check)
- P15: Monotonic decode success with increasing overhead

589 new lines, all 15 tests passing. Unblocks D4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
